# Helse- og omsorgsdepartementet

*55 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Aktieselskapet Vinmonopolet [vinmonopolloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1931-06-19-18.md) | Vinmonopolloven |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1931-06-19-18.md) |
| [Lov om Statens undersøkelseskommisjon for helse- og omsorgstjenesten](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-56.md) | Lov om Statens undersøkelseskommisjon for helse- og omsorgstjenesten | 2018-06-15, 2019-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-56.md) |
| [Lov om abort (abortloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-12-20-96.md) | Abortloven | 2025-06-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-12-20-96.md) |
| [Lov om alternativ behandling av sykdom mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-06-27-64.md) | Alternativ behandlingsloven – albhl | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-27-64.md) |
| [Lov om apotek (apotekloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-06-02-39.md) | Apotekloven – apotl | 2001-03-01, 2001-07-01 (§ 8-1) | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-06-02-39.md) |
| [Lov om atomenergivirksomhet [atomenergiloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1972-05-12-28.md) | Atomenergiloven – atomenl | 1973-07-01, 1974-12-04 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1972-05-12-28.md) |
| [Lov om behandling av helseopplysninger ved ytelse av helsehjelp (pasientjournall](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-42.md) | Pasientjournalloven | 2015-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-42.md) |
| [Lov om behandlingsbiobanker (behandlingsbiobankloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-02-21-12.md) | Behandlingsbiobankloven – biobl | 2003-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-02-21-12.md) |
| [Lov om donasjon og transplantasjon av organ, celler og vev (transplantasjonslova](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-05-07-25.md) | Transplantasjonslova | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-05-07-25.md) |
| [Lov om endring av juridisk kjønn](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-46.md) | Lov om endring av juridisk kjønn | 2016-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-46.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i pasient- og brukarrettslova, helsepersonellova m.m. (styrking](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-53.md) | Endringslov til pasient- og brukarrettslova, helsepersonellova m.m. | 2018-01-01, 2017-07-01, 2019-04-10, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-53.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i alkoholloven, atomenergiloven, folkehelseloven, legemiddellov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-22-76.md) | Endringer i alkoholloven mv | 2019-01-01, 2022-01-01, 2024-09-17, 2026-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-22-76.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i folkehelseloven m.m. (krav til systematisk og kunnskapsbasert](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-69.md) | Endringslov til folkehelseloven m.m. | 2026-01-01, 2026-02-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-69.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i helseforskningsloven mv. (vilkår for medisinsk og helsefaglig](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-71.md) | Endringslov til helseforskningsloven mv. | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-71.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i helselovgivningen (tilgjengeliggjøring av helsedata og krav t](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-126.md) | Endringslov til helselovgivningen | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-126.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i helsepersonelloven og pasientjournalloven mv. (taushetsplikt ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2026-01-23-1.md) | Endringslov til helsepersonelloven og pasientjournalloven mv. | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-01-23-1.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i helsetilsynsloven mv. (ny meldeordning for alvorlige hendelse](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-74.md) | Endringslov til helsetilsynsloven mv. | 2025-06-20, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-74.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i matloven (hjemmel for overtredelsesgebyr ved brudd på forskri](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-75.md) | Endringslov til matloven | 2027-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-75.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven og helse- og omsorgstjenest](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-45.md) | Endringslov til pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven mv | Kongen bestemmer, 2016-07-01, 2017-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-45.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i psykisk helsevernloven og pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven m](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-67.md) | Endringslov til psykisk helsevernloven mv | 2025-09-01, 2026-06-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-67.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i spesialisthelsetjenesteloven og pasient- og brukerrettighetsl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-12-20-103.md) | Endringslov til spesialisthelsetjenesteloven og pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven | 2020-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-12-20-103.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i tobakksskadeloven (gjennomføring av direktiv 2014/40/EU og st](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-02-10-5.md) | Endringslov til tobakksskadeloven | Kongen bestemmer, 2017-04-01, 2017-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-02-10-5.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i tobakksskadeloven (strengere regulering av e-sigaretter)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-12-20-107.md) | Endringslov til tobakksskadeloven | 2023-12-20, 2024-01-01, 2024-07-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-12-20-107.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i tobakksskadeloven (ulovlig handel med tobakksvarer mv.)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-22-77.md) | Endringslov til tobakkskadeloven | 2020-11-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-22-77.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i tobakksskadeloven, strålevernloven og atomenergiloven (utvide](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-70.md) | Endringslov til tobakksskadeloven, strålevernloven og atomenergiloven | 2025-06-20, 2025-07-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-70.md) |
| [Lov om erstatning ved pasientskader mv. (pasientskadeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-53.md) | Pasientskadeloven – passkl | 2003-01-01, 2009-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-53.md) |
| [Lov om etablering og gjennomføring av psykisk helsevern (psykisk helsevernloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-07-02-62.md) | Psykisk helsevernloven – phvl | 2001-01-01, 2001-07-01, 2002-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-02-62.md) |
| [Lov om folkehelsearbeid (folkehelseloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-06-24-29.md) | Folkehelseloven – fhl | 2012-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-06-24-29.md) |
| [Lov om helseforetak m.m. (helseforetaksloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-93.md) | Helseforetaksloven – hfl | 2002-01-01, 2001-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-93.md) |
| [Lov om helsemessig og sosial beredskap (helseberedskapsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-06-23-56.md) | Helseberedskapsloven – hlsberedskl | 2001-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-06-23-56.md) |
| [Lov om helsepersonell m.v. (helsepersonelloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-07-02-64.md) | Helsepersonelloven – hpl | 2001-01-01, 2000-04-14 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-02-64.md) |
| [Lov om helseregistre og behandling av helseopplysninger (helseregisterloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-43.md) | Helseregisterloven – hregl | 2015-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-43.md) |
| [Lov om humanmedisinsk bruk av bioteknologi m.m. (bioteknologiloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-05-100.md) | Bioteknologiloven – biotl | 2004-01-01, 2004-09-01, 2005-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-12-05-100.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang m.m. for utvalg som skal undersøke saker om overgrep ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-06-18-119.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang (overgrep begått av helsepersonell) | 2021-06-18, 2022-04-16 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-06-18-119.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale helse- og omsorgstjenester m.m. (helse- og omsorgstjenesteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-06-24-30.md) | Helse- og omsorgstjenesteloven – hol | 2012-01-01, 2012-07-01, 2014-04-01, 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-06-24-30.md) |
| [Lov om kosmetikk og kroppspleieprodukt m.m. (kosmetikklova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-12-21-126.md) | Kosmetikklova | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-12-21-126.md) |
| [Lov om legemidler m.v. (legemiddelloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-132.md) | Legemiddelloven | 1994-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-132.md) |
| [Lov om matproduksjon og mattrygghet mv. (matloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-12-19-124.md) | Matloven – matl | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-12-19-124.md) |
| [Lov om medisinsk og helsefaglig forskning (helseforskningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-06-20-44.md) | Helseforskningsloven – hforsknl | 2009-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-06-20-44.md) |
| [Lov om medisinsk utstyr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-01-12-6.md) | Lov om medisinsk utstyr – medutstl | 1995-01-12 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1995-01-12-6.md) |
| [Lov om medisinsk utstyr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-05-07-37.md) | Lov om medisinsk utstyr | 2020-05-07, 2021-05-26 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-07-37.md) |
| [Lov om obduksjon og avgjeving av lik til undervisning og forsking (obduksjonslov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-05-07-26.md) | Obduksjonslova | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-05-07-26.md) |
| [Lov om omsetning av alkoholholdig drikk m.v. (alkoholloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1989-06-02-27.md) | Alkoholloven – alkhl | 1990-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1989-06-02-27.md) |
| [Lov om ordning med brukerrom for inntak av narkotika (brukerromsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-07-02-64.md) | Brukerromsloven | 2004-12-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-07-02-64.md) |
| [Lov om pasient- og brukerrettigheter (pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-07-02-63.md) | Pasient- og brukerrettighetsloven – pbrl | 2001-01-01, 2001-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-02-63.md) |
| [Lov om rituell omskjæring av gutter](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-40.md) | Lov om rituell omskjæring av gutter | 2015-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-40.md) |
| [Lov om spesialisthelsetjenesten m.m. (spesialisthelsetjenesteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-07-02-61.md) | Spesialisthelsetjenesteloven – sphl | 2001-01-01, 2001-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-02-61.md) |
| [Lov om statlig tilsyn med helse- og omsorgstjenesten mv. (helsetilsynsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-12-15-107.md) | Helsetilsynsloven | 2018-07-01, 2019-07-01, 2021-10-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-12-15-107.md) |
| [Lov om sterilisering [steriliseringsloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1977-06-03-57.md) | Steriliseringsloven – sterill | 1978-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1977-06-03-57.md) |
| [Lov om strålevern og bruk av stråling [strålevernloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-05-12-36.md) | Strålevernloven – stvl | 2000-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2000-05-12-36.md) |
| [Lov om tannhelsetjenesten (tannhelsetjenesteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1983-06-03-54.md) | Tannhelsetjenesteloven – tannhl | 1984-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1983-06-03-54.md) |
| [Lov om tilskudd til visse private virksomheter med offentlig tjenestepensjonsord](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-03-01-3.md) | Lov om tilskudd til virksomheter med offentlig tjenestepensjonsordning | 2019-03-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2019-03-01-3.md) |
| [Lov om utvalg som skal undersøke forhold knyttet til at personer med kjent psyki](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-73.md) | Lov om undersøkelsesutvalg, psykiske lidelser | 2009-06-19 – 2012-06-30, 2009-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-73.md) |
| [Lov om vern mot smittsomme sykdommer [smittevernloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1994-08-05-55.md) | Smittevernloven – smvl | 1995-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1994-08-05-55.md) |
| [Lov om vern mot tobakksskader (tobakksskadeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1973-03-09-14.md) | Tobakksskadeloven – tobskl | 1975-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1973-03-09-14.md) |
